title: Antiquax ANTQCB200 200ml Copper and Brass Polish - Restores, Protects, and Adds Lustrous Shine
features: Superior Copper and Brass Care: Antiquax ANTQCB200 is expertly crafted to restore the brilliance of copper and brass surfaces, leaving them gleaming with a lasting, lustrous shine.
Advanced Formulation: Our specialized formula not only cleans but also protects against tarnish and corrosion, ensuring your prized possessions maintain their beauty over time.
Effortless Application: Easily achieve professional results with our easy-to-use polish. Simply apply, buff, and witness the transformation. ADD TO CART

Versatile Use: Ideal for a variety of items, including kitchenware, decor, and musical instruments. This polish is a must-have for anyone seeking to preserve and enhance the beauty of copper and brass

Long-Lasting Results: Enjoy prolonged radiance with Antiquax ANTQCB200. The protective layer it creates helps resist future tarnishing, keeping your copper and brass items looking stunning for longer.
description: From the manufacturer About us Antiquax is a renowned brand in the restoration and polishing industry, founded by Mr. Elliott in the early 1900s. The company's products are widely used in various applications, including wood, metal, marble, and floors. Antiquax is trusted by professionals and enthusiasts alike, with its products being used in large stately homes and museums worldwide. The brand's flagship product, Antiquax Original Wax Polish, is a blend of fine beeswax and carnauba wax, designed to penetrate and nourish wood surfaces. It enhances the grain and patina of the wood while providing a lasting sheen, resisting dust and fingerprinting. This product is suitable for all fine natural woods and antique furniture. Antiquax's dedication to quality and craftsmanship has made it a preferred choice for restoring and maintaining various surfaces, showcasing the brand's commitment to excellence in the restoration and polishing industry
